zh.lifeSummary: Ellice Fitzgerald是Gerald FitzJames FitzGerald, 14th Earl of Desmond的女兒，於1576年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利迪拉利。她於1597年與Valentine Browne在愛爾蘭庫迪 本 馮 克羅斯 本 迪拉利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1658年享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Ellice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the numerous girls' names beginning with the syllable El-, in particular Eleanor . At the beginning of the 21st century it enjoyed a surge in popularity as an independent given name, often also used in compounds such as Ellie-Ann, Ellie-Mae, and Ellie-Louise.

variants.name: Elly
meanings: Pet form of any of the numerous girls' names beginning with the syllable El-, in particular Eleanor . At the beginning of the 21st century it enjoyed a surge in popularity as an independent given name, often also used in compounds such as Ellie-Ann, Ellie-Mae, and Ellie-Louise.

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

Great Catholic-Gaelic rebellion for return of lands, later joined by Old English Catholics in Ireland. Under leadership of Irish chieftain, Rory O'More, conspiracy was formed to seize Dublin and expel the English. English settlers were driven out of Ulster. Catholics hold 59% of land in Ireland.

The Protestant Lord Protector of England, Oliver Cromwell, landed at Dublin. His troops killed 2,000 men. A great part of lands in Munster, Leinster and Ulster (Drogheda and Wexford) was confiscated and divided among the English soldiers.

en.lifeSummary: Ellice Fitzgerald was born in 1576, in Tipperary, County Tipperary, Ireland as the daughter of Gerald FitzJames FitzGerald, 14th Earl of Desmond. She married Valentine Browne in 1597, in County of the Cross of Tipperary, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1658, at the age of 82.

Elle a épousé Valentine Browne en 1597, à County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1658, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ko.County Tipperary, Ireland: 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 크로스 프 티페라리
ko.lifeSummary: Ellice Fitzgerald(은)는 1576년 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 티페라리에서 Gerald FitzJames FitzGerald, 14th Earl of Desmond의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1597년 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 크로스 프 티페라리에서 Valentine Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1658년 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.County Tipperary, Ireland: коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Ellice Fitzgerald родилась в 1576 г. в местности типпирэри, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия. Её отца звали Gerald FitzJames FitzGerald, 14th Earl of Desmond. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Valentine Browne в 1597 г. в местности коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1658 г. в возрасте 82 лет.
